item.name: Maelstrom Turban
item.description:
The presence of these shellfish in shallow waters is considered to be an ill omen, for they are believed to be the harbinger of storms, violent winds, and worse.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Feasting upon the nutrients replete in spectral currents, these shelled wavekin grow to prodigious sizes. In the folklore of Hingashi are tales of gale winds caused by the shell's unique structure, and many still believe the maelstrom turban to be the source of inclement weather in the region.
